description_long: This is a single, ripe pear with a classic teardrop shape, featuring a broad, rounded base that tapers smoothly to a narrower top where a short, slightly curved brown stem is attached. The skin is a pale yellow-green with subtle speckling and a matte finish, giving it a natural, fresh appearance. The surface is slightly uneven, with gentle dimples and a soft, semi-glossy sheen that suggests juiciness beneath the skin. The stem is woody and textured, contrasting with the smoother body of the fruit. The pear appears plump and well-formed, with no visible blemishes or bruises. Its overall look is consistent with a fresh, market-quality pear ready for consumption.
description: A plump, ripe yellow-green pear with a smooth, speckled skin and a short brown stem. The fruit is fresh, unblemished, and has a natural matte finish.
description_view_0: The pear is seen from a slightly angled front, showing its broad base, smooth skin, and the curved brown stem at the top.
description_view_1: This view presents the pear directly from the back, highlighting its symmetrical, rounded shape and the straight-on view of the stem.
description_view_2: The pear is shown from a side angle, emphasizing the gentle curve of the stem and the subtle dimples on the skin.
description_view_3: A direct front view of the pear, with the stem pointing straight up and the widest part of the fruit clearly visible.
attribute_contextual_placement: resting upright in a display bin or fruit bowl
